entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="HR Source Joiner event" workflowRef="HR Source Joiner event"> <Messages> <Message key="err_exception" type="Error"> <Parameters> <Message key="Typed variable declaration : Constructor error: Can't find default constructor for: class sailpoint.api.Provisioner : at Line: 15 " type="Error"/> </Parameters> </Message> </Messages> <TaskResultRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskResult" id="HR Source Joiner event - 3ea68b53f8d747c6b1ff6ea2f875cbeb" name="HR Source Joiner event - 3ea68b53f8d747c6b1ff6ea2f875cbeb"/> </TaskResultRef> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" name="HR Source Joiner event"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
